title: 🔥周期定位复刻22年底部
body: 市场处于历史大级别底部震荡阶段。MVRV 报 1.19，该指标低于历史 81% 的时间，且数值逼近上轮周期底部（2022-07）的 0.98。尽管价格 7 日下跌 12.1%，但周期位置显示已深度复刻上轮熊市极值，长期胜率极高。偏多。历史是否在重演？
body_en: The market is in a historical macro bottom consolidation phase. MVRV stands at 1.19, a level lower than 81% of historical records, and is approaching the 0.98 mark from the last cycle bottom (July '22). Despite a 12.1% drop over the last 7 days, cycle positioning shows we are deeply echoing the extremes of the previous bear market, giving a massive edge for the long term. Bullish bias. Is history repeating itself?
